ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the district information was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data for the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone classification of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the district */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language spoken in the district */,
  " literacy_rate" TEXT /* Literacy rate of the district */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the district headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language spoken in the state */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the state headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the zone for visual mapping */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., development, disaster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_updates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Social Media, Government Report) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_zones" (
  "district_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district-zone association */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was associated with the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_zones_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_zones_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the district data */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_survey_responses_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)
